name: Cheddar Cheese Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Ensure all ingredients are at room temperature.
2. Combine the shredded cheddar cheese, butter, cocoa, confectioners sugar, and nonfat dry milk in a large mixing bowl.
3. Mix until creamy. If necessary, moisten the mixture with 1/4 cup whole milk.
4. Pour into a buttered 9-inch square pan and chill.
5. Once firm, cut into 64 squares.
6. Makes about 3 1/2 lbs.
7. Note: Drained maraschino cherries, flaked coconut, miniature marshmallows, or chopped nuts may be added.
